summary: Iteration 40 - AgentDetailsDrawer Testing - ALL CORE FEATURES VERIFIED. Tested the premium Details drawer/modal for the Agent Marketplace. Clicking 'Detalhes' button opens a full-screen drawer from bottom with agent profile. Verified: avatar, name, full_title, rating badge, type badge (Vendas/Suporte/Agenda/Pessoal), category badge, animated skill bars with percentages, all collapsible sections (Mentalidade, Habilidades, Background, Metodologias, Personalidade, Pontos Fortes, Estilo de Interacao, Inspiracoes), Crown icon for personal agents, close button, overlay click close, Deploy button functionality.

ui_bugs.issue: Deploy button at bottom is partially blocked by bottom navigation bar - requires force click to activate
ui_bugs.root_cause: The drawer's sticky Deploy footer with absolute positioning (bottom-0) overlaps with the fixed bottom navigation bar (z-50). The Deploy button's z-index doesn't overcome the nav bar interception.
ui_bugs.suggested_fix: Increase the drawer's Deploy footer pb-4 to pb-20 or add safe-area-inset-bottom to account for bottom nav, OR increase z-index of Deploy button container

drawer_opening.animation: Slides in from bottom with CSS animation

crown_icon_personal_agents.note: Crown icon appears next to agent name for is_personal=true agents

habilidades_section.skill_bars: 8 animated skill bars with percentage labels
habilidades_section.animation: Bars animate from 0 to percentage value with staggered delay

metodologias_section.content: Methodology tags (e.g., SPIN Selling, Challenger Sale, SNAP Selling)

personalidade_section.content: Personality trait tags (e.g., Empathetic listener, Strategic thinker)

overlay_close.behavior: Clicking dark overlay/backdrop closes the drawer

deploy_button.issue: Button blocked by bottom nav - requires force click

action_items: FIX (MEDIUM): Deploy button in AgentDetailsDrawer is blocked by bottom navigation bar. The sticky footer with pb-4 doesn't account for the bottom nav height. Recommend adding pb-20 or using safe-area-inset-bottom.
critical_code_review_comments: AgentDetailsDrawer.jsx line 246-255: Deploy footer uses 'absolute bottom-0' positioning with pb-4 which doesn't account for the fixed bottom nav (height ~60px). This causes click interception.
data-testid attributes are well implemented: agent-details-drawer, close-agent-details, deploy-modal-{name}, section-* for all collapsible sections
Skill bar animation (SkillBar component lines 10-30) works correctly with staggered delays
Section component (lines 33-50) correctly handles defaultOpen state for expand/collapse

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All features work, Deploy button has z-index issue

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 40: AgentDetailsDrawer fully tested. All sections verified working. Key data-testids: agent-details-drawer, close-agent-details, deploy-modal-{name}, details-{name}, section-mentalidade, section-habilidades, section-background, section-metodologias, section-personalidade, section-pontos-fortes, section-estilo-de-interacao, section-inspiracoes. One issue: Deploy button blocked by bottom nav (workaround: force click). Personal agents (Alex, Luna, Max) show Crown icon and PESSOAL badge.
